evals.prompt: Pull the most recent releases for the brief.
assertions: If a provider filter was requested, it is applied

evals.prompt: Enrich each curated pick with full spec.
evals.expected_output: Full record per model with capabilities and pricing.
assertions: get_model is called once per curated pick (no duplicates)

evals.prompt: Optionally store the brief back into totext-cloud.
evals.expected_output: The brief becomes a document in the user's library.
assertions: upload_url is called only when the user asked to store the brief
The URL passed is the signed download URL of the brief generated in the container
The user is told the ingestion is async
